_publications._publicationTitle: MEK Inhibition Enhances the Antitumor Effect of Radiotherapy in NF1-Deficient Glioblastoma.

_contextSnippet: NF1-deficient heterotopic xenografts (JHH-520 and JHH-136) exhibited decreased growth in response to combined treatment...benefit was most durable in mice treated concurrently
details: NF1-deficient heterotopic xenografts showed decreased growth with MEKi plus radiation combination, with most durable benefit when treatments given concurrently
